fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from Invesco Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-03-31 is ₹71.71.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: 1Y returns: 5.50%. 3Y annualised returns: 27.57%. 5Y annualised returns: 24.36%. Since inception returns: 11.34%. Compared with category 1Y average 5.81%. category 3Y average 28.28%. category 5Y average 29.79%.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 21.78. Sharpe ratio: 1.19. Alpha: -1.21. Beta: 0.95.

fund_name: Invesco India PSU Equity Fund Direct Growth
text: Expense ratio is 0.91%. Exit load policy: Exit load for units in excess of 10% of the investment, 1% will be charged for redemption within 1 year. Minimum SIP investment is ₹100. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹1000. Taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
